title: Publish the verified local commits to origin/main (explicit user request)
action: git push the current main branch (6 local commits: ro-1 close chain + ag-1 + ag-2 + their knowledge syncs, all verified green) to origin. No source edits. Verify: branch no longer ahead of origin/main.
verify: node -e "const{execSync}=require('child_process');const s=execSync('git status -sb').toString();if(/ahead/.test(s)){console.error('still ahead:',s);process.exit(1)}console.log('in sync with origin:',s.trim())"
must_haves: origin/main contains all local commits; working tree untouched

trace.verify_output: ## main...origin/main — pushed 9b62724..7e2f9d6, branch in sync, no 'ahead'
